response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, hands-on senior engineer with ~15 years of broad experience (web, mobile, embedded, high-throughput backends) and strong software craftsmanship credentials (TDD, CI/CD, open-source authorship). However, the role is a Principal/IC6 position centered on growth and experimentation systems, and the resume shows no experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis. There is also no evidence of principal-level scope such as leading multi-team, multi-workstream initiatives or building platforms adopted across many teams. The mismatch in both domain and seniority scope outweighs the solid engineering fundamentals.
strengths: Strong, broad engineering fundamentals across languages (TypeScript, C/C++, Java, C#, DLang) exceeding the 8+ years requirement
High-scale production experience (low-latency microservices handling millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Demonstrated craftsmanship and mentorship: TDD advocacy, workshops, open-source test tooling, and recent AI-agent/MCP tooling work
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-engineering experience — the core of the role
No demonstrated principal-level leadership of multi-team, cross-product initiatives or platforms used across multiple teams
Limited evidence of data/statistics aptitude, metrics infrastructure, or measurement-platform work

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and high-scale systems background
